generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoUST10LXLiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for visual data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCameraVisualDataTransmitted
]

instance SpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCameraVisualDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "LiDAR point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoUST10LXLiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANEnabler
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCameraVisualData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Visual data from Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCameraVisualDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object track data from Kalman filter"
]

instance Motor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor for converting desired speed commands into motor voltage"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for adjusting steering angles"
]

instance DBSCANEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN-based point cloud clustering enabler"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance KalmanFilterEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filter object tracking enabler"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC control model enabler"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for performance-critical components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data Monitoring (real-time display, saving, and reporting of vehicle state and object tracks)"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight, DeveloperTroubleshootingReportInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation Offloading (offloading ACC logic to cloud)"
    DTDFVocab:provides ComputationOffloadedInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote Management (remote enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking via UI)"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state, object tracks, and projected path for operator decision-making"
]

instance DeveloperTroubleshootingReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Reports for developer troubleshooting"
]

instance ComputationOffloadedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Confirmation of ACC logic offloaded to cloud"
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC via remote UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC via remote UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed via remote UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking via remote UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TraxxasSlash4x4Chassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium chassis"
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonNXAntenna : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX antenna"
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNanoMicrocomputer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer"
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller"
]

instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains TraxxasSlash4x4Chassis, NVIDIAJetsonNXAntenna, NVIDIAJetsonOrinNanoMicrocomputer, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VedderElectronicSpeedController
    base:desc "A 1/10-scale autonomous vehicle built on a Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium chassis, retrofitted with NVIDIA Jetson NX antenna, NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer, Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR, Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera, and Vedder Electronic Speed Controller. Case study-based development using ISO 23247 RA as starting point requirements defined via case-based generalization implementation as ROS2 packages artifacts publicly available for reuse."
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-based ACC control model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands (desired speed, emergency braking, enable/disable) from the digital twin to the physical twin's motor and steering actuators."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with network latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms as per 3GPP 22.185 for V2V communication."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based architecture with Physical Twin Entity (on vehicle), Digital Twin Entity (cloud), User Entity (separate UI), and Cross-System Entity (Data Translation); components communicate via ROS2 internally and Wi-Fi between entities."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design phase for experimentation and validation, and operation phase for optimization and health monitoring, supporting end-to-end digital threads throughout the vehicle lifecycle."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-component communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication with Data Translation component handling serialization, message alignment, and unit conversions."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle's Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity and Data Storage hosted in cloud; User Entity on separate machine for UI."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for digital twins; ACC implementation based on ISO 15622."
]
